com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXReportFactory


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXReportFactory
    report factory is used to create a report and its allied objects (modules/templates) see IXReport,IXReportModule and IXReportTemplate.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXReport createReport(java.lang.String title)
      create an empty report using a title
      IXReportModule createReportModule(java.lang.String title)
      create an empty report module using a title queries for a report module can be added using addQuery method in report module.
      IXReportModule createReportModule(java.lang.String title, int evaluationScope)
      create an empty report module using a title queries for a report module can be added using addQuery method in report module.
      IXReportTemplate createReportTemplate(IXResultExpression expression, java.lang.String title)
      create report template that defines a column of a report module.
      IXReportTemplate createReportTemplate(IXResultExpression expression, java.lang.String title, int evaluationScope)
      create report template that defines a column of a report module.
      IXReportTemplate createReportTemplate(java.lang.String expressionName, java.lang.String title)
      create a report template using a query expression name( that refers to query expression from system data ) a title and any user defined attributes.

    • Method Detail

      • createReport

        IXReport createReport(java.lang.String title)
        create an empty report using a title
        Parameters:
        title - title of the report
        Returns:
        report (not null if successully created)

      • createReportModule

        IXReportModule createReportModule(java.lang.String title)
        create an empty report module using a title queries for a report module can be added using addQuery method in report module.
        Parameters:
        title - title of the report module
        Returns:
        report module

      • createReportModule

        IXReportModule createReportModule(java.lang.String title,
                                  int evaluationScope)
        create an empty report module using a title queries for a report module can be added using addQuery method in report module.
        Parameters:
        title - title of the report module
        evaluationScope - -- index to the grouping result expression or 0 for de
        Returns:
        report module -

      • createReportTemplate

        IXReportTemplate createReportTemplate(IXResultExpression expression,
                                      java.lang.String title)
        create report template that defines a column of a report module.
        Parameters:
        expression - -- result expression that defines a column of a report.
        title - -- title of the template
        Returns:
        report template

      • createReportTemplate

        IXReportTemplate createReportTemplate(java.lang.String expressionName,
                                      java.lang.String title)
                               throws java.lang.NoSuchFieldException
        create a report template using a query expression name( that refers to query expression from system data ) a title and any user defined attributes. Expression in a report templates is evaluated for each object returned by the queries defined in a reportmodule, thus populating typically a column of a table
        Parameters:
        expressionName - -- expression name from system data.
        title - -- title of the report template.
        Returns:
        report template not null if successfully created.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NoSuchFieldException - -- thrown when the expressioName is not found in system data.

      • createReportTemplate

        IXReportTemplate createReportTemplate(IXResultExpression expression,
                                      java.lang.String title,
                                      int evaluationScope)
        create report template that defines a column of a report module.
        Parameters:
        expression - -- result expression that defines a column of a report.
        title - -- title of the template
        evaluationScope - - index to the grouping expression in the ownming module .
        Returns:
        report template
